title: workweave/router
friendlyTitle: WorkWeave Router helps agents choose the right AI model
summary: WorkWeave Router is a model router and AI gateway for agentic systems, designed as a drop-in proxy for Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, OpenRouter, and OpenAI-compatible endpoints. The project emphasizes per-request routing, BYOK operation, local or hosted deployment, and observability for tools such as Claude Code, Codex, opencode, and Cursor.
friendlySummary: WorkWeave Router is a gateway that can send each AI request to a suitable model across providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and OpenRouter.
whyItMatters: Use it to experiment with routing different coding-agent prompts to different models without rewriting every client integration. It can help teams test cost-control strategies, local-versus-frontier model splits, and observability around agent workloads.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Try it if you use several AI models and want one endpoint that can help control cost, routing, and visibility for agent workflows.
